Our Products

Frost

Poultry
Download PDF

Composition

Dextrose(USP) 25000mg
Vitamin C(USP) 50000mg
Glycerin(USP) 20000mg
Potassium Chloride(USP) 23500mg
Magnesium Chloride(USP) 19000mg
Vitamin E(USP) 1000mg
Betain(USP) 1000mg

FEATURES:

    • Regulate osmotic pressure
    • Re-establish the ionic and hydroelectric balance in the digestive track and blood
    • Natural antioxidant
    • Rapidly available energy
    • Effective against thermal stress

    BENEFITS:

    • Stabilise the blood pH
    • Restore the functions of vital organs such as kidneys, heart, lungs and liver
    • Prevent hypoglycemia
    • Ease the absorption of water and electrolytes
    • Compensate lack of appetite
    • Protection against free radicals

    USAGE:

    • During different types of stress like handling, vaccination, traveling, starting phase, disease, medication, feed adaptation, debeaking and marketing
    • Prevents dehydration in starting chicks, during heatstroke and diseases
    • Giving energy to boose the bird's performance
    • Reduce the damage caused by oxidation
    • Support production by improving feed intake
    • Improve heat stress induced problems like poor immunity, reduce feed intake, increase body temperature, decrease weight gain,loss in carcass weight and mortality in birds

    Packaging

    5 Liter

    Dosage

    • Drinking Water: 1 ml per 4 Liters of Water
    Download PDF
